attempt_log.note: First attempt with tree types ASH/ELM/OAK failed verification. Switched to PINE, verified all four words contain consecutive P-I-N-E.

false_decoy.why_it_fools: ALPINE is definitionally mountainous. The hidden PINE feels like an afterthought, so solvers will confidently place it with PEAK/SUMMIT before realizing the wordplay.

thinking.decoy_seeds: SPINE can feel medical/anatomical. CHOPINES are shoes, could pull toward clothing. ALPINE could pull toward mountain-related words.
